titleStmt.title: SII 22.128: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 128. (A.R. No. 128 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE EAST WALL OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA—9th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of 120 kāśu by Savarṇaṉ Kāśyapaṉ alias Tuṇaiyāḻvāṉ Kaiyugirāḷi (a resident) of Peruṅgūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi for burning a lamp with the interest thereon during the services in the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyaṉār. The amount is said to have been deposited for this purpose with a Śivabrāhmaṇa who had share in the right of worship in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu ṛṣabhanā
yaṟṟu Uṭaiyā rūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiya nāyaṉārkku tirumuṉaippāṭi peruṅkūr savanan kā
śyapaṉ tuṇaiyāḻvāṉ kaiyukirāḷi Iṭṭat tirukkuttiviḷakku 1 It tirukkuttiviḷakkile
cantrādityavaṟ celuttuvutāka vaitta sandhiviḷakku 1- kku policaiyāle Erippatāka I
kaikkoṇṭa kācu 100 2 10 Ikkācu nūṟṟirupatum Ikkaiyukirāḷi pakkale kai
kkoṇṭu Ināyanārkoyilil Aṟupatu vaṭṭattu nāṉ Uṭaiya nāḷe talaicce
ymāṭāka Isandhiviḷakku celuttuvenāka kaikkoṇṭeṉ kulot tuṅkabhaṭṭane
ṉ Itu cantrādityavat panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
